atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Injects Tailwind's base, components, and utilities styles.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Inlines existing utility classes into custom CSS rules.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Organizes custom styles into Tailwind layers.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Specifies a custom Tailwind configuration file.

atDirectives.name: @screen
atDirectives.description: Applies styles at a configured responsive breakpoint.
